[[Luke Gale]] | stadium = [[Wheldon Road]] | avg_attendance = | high_attendance = | top_tries = [[Denny Solomona]] (42) | top_goals = [[Luke Gale]] (120) | top_points = [[Luke Gale]] (270) | prev_season = [[2015 Castleford Tigers season|2015]] | next_season = [[2017 Castleford Tigers season|2017]] | list = yes | list_link = List of Castleford Tigers seasons }} The '''2016 season''' was the '''[[Castleford Tigers]]''' 91st season in the [[Rugby Football League]] and their 9th consecutive season in the top flight of [[Rugby league in England|English rugby league]].
